description: Join the meeting room 'MorningFitness' using the display name 'Coach Mara' and send the following message to the chat: 'Today's Workout: 3 rounds - 20 squats, 15 push-ups, 10 burpees. Rest 60s between rounds.'

metadata.message_text: Today's Workout: 3 rounds - 20 squats, 15 push-ups, 10 burpees. Rest 60s between rounds.
